note: Community registry for AI agent skills. Add yours via PR — see docs/SPEC.md. Entries point at a SKILL.md folder in a public Git repo.

skills.name: pdf
skills.description: Extract text and tables from PDFs, fill forms, merge/split, and create new PDFs.

skills.name: pptx
skills.description: Create, edit and analyze PowerPoint presentations: layouts, templates, charts, slide generation.

skills.name: docx
skills.description: Create, edit and analyze Word documents with tracked changes, comments and formatting.

skills.name: xlsx
skills.description: Read, write and analyze Excel spreadsheets including formulas and charts.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: A skill that helps you author new, well-structured agent skills.
